note: No split between as_of and today -> split_factor 1, so the contemporaneous NOMINAL close equals Yahoo raw_close(last <= as_of). as_of 2026-01-01 is a market holiday, so the last trading day is 2025-12-31 (close 83.71 rounded; raw 83.705). NBIS (Nebius Group) relisted on Nasdaq in Oct-2024 after the Yandex separation, so the trailing-52wk window is effectively a FULL year (254 trading days, first bar 2024-12-26) -- NOT shortened. Price re-derived two independent ways: (1) Yahoo v8 raw_close x split_factor 1, (2) stockanalysis.com daily history (both 83.705). Local committed quote CSV (S014, backtests/data/asof_2025_12_31_nbis_quotes.csv) carries the 83.71 close. Price sits +357% off the 52wk low ($18.31, the early-relisting base) and -40.7% off the 52wk high ($141.10) -> no low/high hug. The entry is deliberately BELOW the Sept-2025 equity print ($92.50) into a contested tape (15.5% short interest, dropped from the Nasdaq-100 rebalance), which is the structured-entry thesis, not a data error.

live_fields.low_high_hug_reason: Not near either extreme: +357% off the 52wk low ($18.31) and -40.7% off the 52wk high ($141.10). No hug to justify.

sources.note: ~252M shares implied by card mcap $21.08B / $83.71; share count reflects the Sept-2025 $1B equity offering (S010) and is consistent with the Q3'25 reporting (S012/S013)

live_fields.value: Connected-power guide: ~220MW by CYE2025 and ~800MW-1GW by CYE2026; ARR target $7-9B for CYE2026 (Q3 letter also cites a $4.3B figure -> carried as model risk). Q3'25 revenue $146.1M (+39% QoQ); group adj-EBITDA loss collapsed to -$5.2M; core adj-EBITDA ~+19%. The forcing metric is connected MW + realized ARR vs the $7-9B target.

sources.note: connected-MW guide (220MW CYE2025 / 800MW-1GW CYE2026), ARR $7-9B target

live_fields.value: As of 2025-12-31: NBIS is a pure-play AI-cloud renting energized, contract-ready capacity. Two anchor contracts: Microsoft ~$17.4-19.4B through 2031 and Meta ~$3B/5yr. Funding stack as-of: Sept-2025 $1B public equity offering at $92.50 (S010) + $2.75B 2.75% convertible senior notes (conversion ref ~$138.75, S009); 9M op cash -$432.4M and 9M PP&E -$2,010.0M with explicit equity/ATM dependence and still-unproven asset-backed debt. Net-cash balance sheet at 9/30/25, no near-term maturities. No post-as_of financing or contract events are used.

sources.note: Microsoft and Meta anchor capacity contracts
$1B public offering of Class A shares at $92.50
15.5% short interest into a contested tape (context for the structured entry)
